ResearchProjectDef.label: matter digitization
ResearchProjectDef.description: By reducing physical matter to stable digital patterns, colonists can archive goods in banks of encoded storage and retrieve them when needed. What was once a logistical nightmare becomes a seamless web of matter, memory, and control.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->linked storage devices into a unified logistics network

ResearchProjectDef.label: network power storage
ResearchProjectDef.description: By adapting high-density capacitors for encoded matter networks, colonists can build reserve cells that keep network storage available during grid outages, solar flares, and temporary power shortages.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->buffered a matter network against power failure
subject_story->built reserve cells for digitized storage
